email_draft.subject: Professional background inquiry: [Name]
email_draft.body: Hi [Name], I am conducting a review of professionals in your sector and noticed limited public information regarding your current initiatives. To ensure my records are accurate, I have three questions: 1. What is your current professional focus? 2. Are you open to a brief informational exchange? 3. Could you provide a current summary of your work? I look forward to connecting directly.

linkedin_inmail.body: Hi [Name], I am looking to connect with professionals in your field to discuss industry trends. Your profile appeared in my search, but I noticed a lack of public background. I would appreciate the opportunity to learn more about your current focus and professional goals. Best, [Name].

conversation_starters.opener: I'm reaching out to establish a direct connection as my internal data on your profile is currently incomplete.
conversation_starters.context: Used to initiate contact while acknowledging the lack of data.

conversation_starters.opener: I am currently updating my industry network map and would like to capture your current professional scope accurately.
conversation_starters.context: Positions the request as a professional data-gathering exercise.

conversation_starters.opener: Could you provide a brief overview of your current priorities? I want to ensure I understand your professional context correctly.
conversation_starters.context: Used during initial dialogue to build trust through objective inquiry.
